    1. GameOverPhase(PlayerEntity)

Klasse GameOverPhase

java.lang.Object
phases.GamePhase
phases.GameOverPhase
public class GameOverPhase extends GamePhase
Represents the game over phase in the game. This phase is active when the game has ended.

  • Feldübersicht

    Von Klasse geerbte Felder phases.GamePhase

    playerEntity

  • Konstruktordetails

    • GameOverPhase

      public GameOverPhase(PlayerEntity playerEntity)
      Constructor for GameOverPhase. Initializes the game over phase with the specified player entity.
      Parameter:
      playerEntity - The player entity associated with this game phase.
